mentions.note: Lip Bu Tan featured at Computex; stock did not hold up like peers; burgeoning packaging division under new leadership.
CEO Lip Bu Tan backing semiconductor IP value; company now part of semis-leading-market thesis; Cramer to interview CEO on Monday.

Turnaround under Lip Bu Tan exceptional—culture reset, balance sheet fixed via government/Nvidia/SoftBank capital, CPU demand surging on AI shift. Risk production 14A (1.4nm) 2028, volume 2029 vs. TSMC timeline; foundry business pivoting to billions revenue.
Semiconductor manufacturer in chips/semis AI infrastructure layer. U.S. chip manufacturing revival tied to AI buildout.
CPUs now gold as data center demand explodes. Stock can't seem to stop. Was short on supply; now critical to ecosystem.
CPU shortage benefits; semiconductor equipment makers maxed out, can't solve supply; growth stocks getting higher valuations as market reprices from value.
YoY +399% return; foundry turnaround and semis recovery; individual stock wealth creation opportunity.
